params.name: Magna Carta
params.source:
*Britland Treasure Map (10%), Expert Scrolls (0.95%), Fragment Crafting (3.9%), Lottery Machine (0.08%), Wishing (0.35%)
* [[Indigent Nobleman]] (210k {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}})
params.description:
On Mar 15, AD 1215, the United Kingdom signed the first legal document that restricted the royal family's power.

On this day, the Magna Carta was signed by British feudal lords and the Lackland John. This was the first time human rights were stipulated in a legal text and it put the earliest human rights into practice. It declared the principle that the king and his government are not above the law. The listed provisions have a great impact on the system's guarantee of freedom.
